user.title: Suivi Médiathèque
user.description:
Configure your TMDb API key, optional NAS connection, and media library paths.
Paths can be comma-separated for multiple directories.
If NAS is configured, enter share names (e.g. 'Films'). Otherwise, enter full local paths (e.g. '/media/films').

data_description.nas_server: IP or hostname of your NAS, e.g. 192.168.1.100. Leave empty for local paths.
data_description.nas_username: SMB/CIFS username for your NAS share.
data_description.nas_password: SMB/CIFS password for your NAS share.
data_description.movies_paths: NAS share name (e.g. 'Films') or local path (e.g. '/media/films').
data_description.series_paths: NAS share name (e.g. 'Series') or local path (e.g. '/media/series').
data_description.anime_paths: NAS share name (e.g. 'Anime') or local path (e.g. '/media/anime').

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid TMDb API key. Please check and try again.

data_description.nas_server: IP or hostname of your NAS. Leave empty for local paths.
data_description.nas_username: SMB/CIFS username for your NAS share.
data_description.nas_password: SMB/CIFS password for your NAS share.
data_description.movies_paths: NAS share name (e.g. 'Films') or local path (e.g. '/media/films').
data_description.series_paths: NAS share name (e.g. 'Series') or local path (e.g. '/media/series').
data_description.anime_paths: NAS share name (e.g. 'Anime') or local path (e.g. '/media/anime').
